content: Hello, I am new to Rust and I have a dummy question. If I want to use the sample rust device (say, open and write to rust_miscdev) inside another kernel module written in Rust, what would be 1) the easiest way and 2) a safe way to achieve it? In C code, a function can be exported by EXPORT_SYMBOL so that any other part of the kernel can call the function directly (as all modules are placed in the same kernel virtual memory space). I am curious how Rust handles this and improves safety guarantees.
I am trying to move this message to a separate topic: https://rust-for-linux.zulipchat.com/#narrow/stream/291565-Help/topic/Newbie.20Corner/near/297237293
